title: Tenn Well Red White Christmas String, 200m Cotton Twine String for Gift Wrapping, Crafts, Baking, Butchers and Festive Decoration
features: COTTON STRING - Made of cotton, this red and white Christmas twine is a perfect addition to your holiday crafts. Its natural material ensures it's safe for the environment while providing a festive touch to your projects

DIMENSION - With a length of 656 feet (200m) and a thickness of 2mm, this red and white string is long and durable enough for various holiday uses, from gift wrapping to creating festive decorations and crafts

VERSATILE CHRISTMAS STRING - Ideal for Christmas gift wrapping, decorating Christmas trees, making candy cane-inspired designs, and adding a splash of colour to your holiday crafts. This coloured string is perfect for any festive project, giving a cheerful touch to your home and gifts

MULTI-PURPOSE XMAS STRING - This string for gift wrapping and crafting is perfect for creating garlands, holiday centrepieces, or any DIY decorations. Its versatility makes it a must-have for a variety of seasonal and creative projects

EASY TO USE - Neatly packaged on a spool for easy dispensing and storage, this Christmas twine is ready for use. Simply cut to your desired length and share the joy by using it in holiday crafts with family and friends
description: Product Description Tenn Well Red and White Cotton Twine is made of cotton material, which is perfect for baking, butchers and wrapping. Cotton twine also works well on arts & crafts, floristry, book binding and school projects. Each baker twine contains 200 meters, and its thread is rather strong and durable. NATURAL COTTON This red and white bakers twine is made of cotton, which is safe and would not hurt the environment . . STRONG AND DURABLE With a thickness of 2mm, the cotton twine has great strength and durability. It will hold you stuff in place without snapping. 656 feet long, it is enough to meet most of your needs. You can cut it where you desire. Specifications: Material: Cotton Length: 656 feet / 200m Diameter: 2mm Color: Red and White Gift Wrapping The cotton twine is soft, vibrantly colored and would be a nice decorative touch for gift giving. Arts and Crafts You can use it to hang up banners at birthday party. It also can be used to embellish your scrapbooks, party favors, cards, and DIY crafts. Packing The twine string is great for food presentation, box decoration and so on.
